- tapOn: Get Started
- tapOn: "1"

appId: id.paradym.wallet
---
- launchApp
- tapOn: "1"
- tapOn: "2"
- tapOn: "3"
- tapOn: "4"
- tapOn: "5"
- tapOn: "6"
## In general the Wallet seems not handle redirects well, at least not on Android
## We resorted to letting click the deeplink in the browser directly
## Below all the failed experiments:
# Bundesdruckerei and Paradym issuer return a 404, maybe because the credential offer can be used only once
# - openLink: https://credimi.io/api/credential/deeplink?id=forkbomb-bv-andrea/misc-issuer-integration-demo/findynet-paradym-test-issuer&redirect=true
# - openLink: https://credimi.io/api/credential/deeplink?id=forkbomb-bv-andrea/misc-issuer-integration-demo/animo-bundesdruckerei-pid-issuer&redirect=true
# Sphereon is broken also by scanning
# - openLink: https://credimi.io/api/credential/deeplink?id=forkbomb-bv-andrea/misc-issuer-integration-demo/findynet-sphereon-issuer&redirect=true
# EUDIW links do not redirect, presumably because Paradym has not registered haip-vci://
#- openLink: https://credimi.io/api/credential/deeplink?id=forkbomb-bv-andrea/misc-issuer-integration-demo/eudiw-pid-mdoc-haip-vci&redirect=true
#- openLink: https://credimi.io/api/credential/deeplink?id=forkbomb-bv-andrea/misc-issuer-integration-demo/eudiw-pid-pid-vc-sd-jwt-haip-vci&redirect=true
- openLink: https://credimi.io/marketplace/credentials/forkbomb-bv-andrea/misc-issuer-integration-demo/animo-bundesdruckerei-pid-issuer#qr_code
- tapOn:
    text: "openid-credential-offer://\\?credential_offer_uri=.*"
- runFlow:
    when:
      visible: "1"
    commands:
      - tapOn: "1"
      - tapOn: "2"
      - tapOn: "3"
      - tapOn: "4"
      - tapOn: "5"
      - tapOn: "6"
- tapOn: Yes, continue
- tapOn: Continue
- tapOn: Accept
